ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in the workforce */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code where the customer resides */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Number of family members */,
  "ccavg" REAL /* Average credit card spending */,
  "education_level" INTEGER /* Education level (1: Undergrad, 2: Graduate, 3: Advanced/Professional) */,
  "mortgage" INTEGER /* Mortgage amount */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Last date of contact with the customer */,
  "contact_preference" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date when the customer first joined the company */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "net_worth" REAL /* Estimated net worth of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_zip_code FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_education_level FOREIGN KEY ("education_level") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., Personal Loan, Securities Account) */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the product */,
  "annual_fee" REAL /* Annual fee associated with the product */,
  "minimum_balance" REAL /* Minimum balance required for the product */,
  "maximum_loan_amount" REAL /* Maximum loan amount for loan products */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_products" (
  "customer_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-product relationship */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the product is currently active */,
  "date_activated" TEXT /* Date when the product was activated */,
  "date_deactivated" TEXT /* Date when the product was deactivated */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent on the product */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction related to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_products_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "state" TEXT /* State name */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the area */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the population */,
  "median_home_value" INTEGER /* Median home value in the area */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the area */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average household size in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., Undergrad, Graduate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, PhD) */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., Deposit, Withdrawal) */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number associated with the transaction */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the transaction occurred */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the transaction is recurring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., Online Banking, Credit Card Usage) */,
  "engagement_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the engagement in minutes */,
  "engagement_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the engagement */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used for the engagement (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_engagement_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_engagement_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of the service (e.g., Banking, Credit) */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the service */,
  "service_availability" TEXT /* Availability of the service (e.g., 24/7, business hours) */,
  "service_limitations" TEXT /* Limitations or restrictions on the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Sales, Customer Service) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the role (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for intermediate, 3 for advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
